contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you. Reach us through any of the channels below.

quicklinks.title: Get in Touch
quicklinks.subtitle: Order by phone or reach us on social media

policy.title: Policies
policy.privacy_p1: Samson Fashion collects only the information necessary to process your order — your name and phone number. We do not share your personal information with third parties.
policy.privacy_p2: Your contact details are used solely to confirm and deliver your order.
policy.shipping_p1: We deliver across Addis Ababa and major Ethiopian cities.
policy.shipping_p2: Shipping costs are calculated based on your location and communicated when we confirm your order.
policy.returns_p1: We accept returns within 7 days of delivery if the item is unused and in its original condition.
policy.returns_r1: Items must be unworn and in original packaging
policy.returns_r2: Contact us by phone to initiate a return
policy.returns_r3: Exchange or store credit will be issued upon inspection
policy.returns_r4: Custom or sale items are non-returnable
policy.returns_cta: To start a return, call us at
policy.order_p1: All orders are placed by phone or through our online request form. Payment is made upon delivery.
policy.order_p2: After placing an order request, our team will call you within 1 hour to confirm availability, size, color, and delivery details.

about.title: About
about.p1: Samson Fashion is a premier destination for quality footwear in Ethiopia. We specialize in handcrafted leather shoes, sandals, boots, and sneakers that combine traditional Ethiopian craftsmanship with modern style.
about.p2: Every pair is carefully crafted by skilled artisans using premium materials — from handstitched leather Oxfords to comfortable everyday sandals.
about.p3: Based in Addis Ababa, our mission is to make quality footwear accessible to everyone while supporting local artisans.
about.v1: Quality — premium materials and expert craftsmanship
about.v2: Authenticity — genuinely handcrafted by local artisans
about.v4: Simplicity — order by phone, pay on delivery
about.order_p: Browse our collection, find your perfect pair, and place an order. We will call you within 1 hour to confirm. Cash on delivery — no online payment required.
